title: desmodium congestum
intro: Desmodium congestum, also known as tick trefoil, is a perennial legume native to North America, characterized by its clusters of small, pink or white flowers and trifoliate leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of tick trefoil include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as acting as a natural diuretic to support kidney function. Desmodium congestum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
